cautious_responder.label: Cautious Responder
cautious_responder.description: Conservative AI that escalates anything uncertain — preferred for initial deployment

fast_responder.label: Fast Responder
fast_responder.description: More autonomous AI that handles routine emails directly — suitable after trust is established

reply_confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score for an AI-drafted reply to be sent without human review

auto_send_enabled.description: Whether allowed replies can be sent automatically or always require human approval

escalation_bias.description: How aggressively the agent escalates to humans on ambiguous cases
